title: 7 Undervalued High-Growth Stocks to Buy Now
text: When markets panic-sell, individual investors typically abandon undervalued high-growth stocks, too. They lump inexpensive companies along with the overpriced ones.

title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Organic Sales Rise
text: Mondelez's (MDLZ) second-quarter 2022 results reflect higher earnings and revenues, with the latter gaining from the Chipita buyout and organic revenues. Meanwhile, margins continue to be hurt by high input costs.

title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Mondelez (MDLZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.69% and 6.85%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Mondelez Q2 beats views, company raises dividend by 10%, but dollar takes bigger toll in outlook
text: Mondelez International Inc. MDLZ, +0.29% late Tuesday reported adjusted second-quarter earnings above Wall Street expectations and increased its dividend by 10%, but said a stronger dollar could take a bigger chunk of its 2022 revenue growth. Mondelez said it earned $747 million, or 54 cents a share, in the quarter, compared with $1.08 billion, or 76 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Mondelez: Achieving Alpha By Ignoring The Noise
text: In spite of all the noise, Mondelez continues to deliver outstanding shareholder returns. Long-term investors should remain focused on MDLZ's strong competitive advantages and strategy.

title: Things to Note as Mondelez (MDLZ) Lines Up for Q2 Earnings
text: Mondelez International's (MDLZ) second-quarter 2022 results are likely to reflect elevated costs and supply-chain headwinds, while pricing and emerging market strength are likely to haveshould aided the company.

title: Enjoy Life Natural Brands, LLC Expands Voluntary Recall of Select Bakery Products Due to Potential Presence of Foreign Material
text: CHICAGO, July 20, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Enjoy Life Natural Brands LLC announced today, out of an abundance of caution, an expansion of its June 30th voluntary recall, to add one product and add additional Best By dates for four products to the list of recalled products.  This recall is due to the potential presence of hard plastic pieces in the products.  This voluntary recall is not related to an allergen and no other Enjoy Life products are affected by this voluntary recall.  The company became aware of the additional items as a result of its internal investigation.

title: 7 Bear Market Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: While there are many popular equities that are on discount, these bear market stocks to buy on the dip can weather the storm. The post 7 Bear Market Stocks to Buy on the Dip appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Mondelēz International Releases 2021 Human Rights Due Diligence and Modern Slavery Report
text: CHICAGO, July 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) today released its annual Human Rights Due Diligence and Modern Slavery report for 2021, demonstrating progress against its 2025 ESG (Environmental, Social and Governance) goals. The report confirms progress made toward the company's goals to prevent, identify, and address potential human rights and modern slavery risks in its own operations and supply chains.

title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Well-Poised on Pricing Actions Amid High Costs
text: Mondelez International (MDLZ) has been undertaking pricing actions to counter the rising inflation pressure. Gains from acquisitions are also aiding the company.

title: Mondelēz International to Report Q2 2022 Financial Results on July 26, 2022
text: CHICAGO, July 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) will release its second quarter 2022 financial results on Tuesday, July 26, 2022 at 4:05 p.m. ET and will host a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET that day.

title: Steady Revenue Growth Has Helped Mondelez Stock Match Market Returns
text: Mondelez International Inc. (NASDAQ: MDLZ) stock price jumped more than 50% from $40 at 2018 end, to around $62 currently, primarily due to favorable changes in its revenue per share.
